scripts.dev: corepack pnpm --filter @health/shared run build && corepack pnpm --parallel --filter @health/shared --filter api --filter web run dev
scripts.dev:api: corepack pnpm --filter @health/shared run build && corepack pnpm --parallel --filter @health/shared --filter api run dev
scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @health/shared --filter api --filter web run build
scripts.lint: corepack pnpm --filter @health/shared --filter api --filter web run lint
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @health/shared --filter api --filter web run test
